mapper.select: SELECT id, parent_id, permission_name, permission_code, url, method, description, status, create_time, update_time FROM sys_permission
SELECT id, parent_id, permission_name, permission_code, url, method, description, status, create_time, update_time FROM sys_permission WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_permission (parent_id, permission_name, permission_code, url, method, description, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{parentId}, #{permissionName}, #{permissionCode}, #{url}, #{method}, #{description}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_permission SET parent_id = #{parentId}, permission_name = #{permissionName}, permission_code = #{permissionCode}, url = #{url}, method = #{method}, description = #{description}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
